title: App Permissions
drDigitalIntro:
Apps may ask for permissions when you install them.
• They might want your camera, microphone, location, or contacts.
• You decide what to allow.
• Deny anything unrelated — a flashlight doesn't need your contacts.

playgroundTask.goal: You evaluated and responded to app permissions

steps.say: Click on NoteMaster to see it in the store.
NoteMaster needs Storage access to save your notes. Click Allow.

drDigitalSuccess: You managed app permissions! Only grant access the app actually needs to work.
drDigitalHint: Install an app, then read each permission request carefully before allowing or denying.
